tasks.desc: Give Heikki a chair to rest
Prepare some knitting to fidget with
Celebrate a new step with Heikki
Patch up a jacket for Heikki
Add a dash more of color to the jacket
Make the jacket look fresh and sharp
Help to get the club room in order
Make sure there is sufficient lighting
Put some games on the top shelf
Make sure not all games are trivial
Add a rare game to the collection
Encourage Heikki to invite people to the club
Take the letters to the post office
Come up with a theme for the menu
Engrave the name of the club on the platter
Assure Heikki that it will go well
